summary: Read-only plan using the cluster preflight artifact as live state. The representative #89829 is open but is a job-declared security-signal ref, so it is routed out of Clownfish scope rather than kept as canonical. The remaining open PRs are mostly useful but distinct plugin/gateway malformed-metadata hardening drafts, with several overlapping subfamilies that need maintainer canonical selection before any close or merge recommendation.
